nodes.context: Commune, gang, and cult led by Charles Manson, active in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s.
Motorcycle club whose treasurer Danny DeCarlo was involved with the Manson Family.
Political organization; Manson mistakenly believed he had killed a Black Panther member and expected retaliation.
Commune, gang, and cult led by Charles Manson, active in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s, responsible for multiple murders.
Commune, gang, and cult led by Charles Manson, active in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s, involved in multiple murders.
Commune, gang, and cult led by Charles Manson, active in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s, responsible for multiple murders.
Prison gang that temporarily accepted Manson after his return to prison.

edges.evidence_quote: Manson brought in members of the Straight Satans Motorcycle Club to act as security.
edges.context: Manson Family hired Straight Satans members for security at Spahn Ranch.

edges.evidence_quote: Manson concluded he had [killed a Black Panther] and expected retaliation from the Panthers.
edges.context: Manson Family anticipated conflict with the Black Panthers after Manson believed he killed a member.

edges.evidence_quote: Though he found temporary acceptance from the Aryan Brotherhood , his role was submissive to a sexually aggressive member of the group at San Quentin .
edges.context: Manson found temporary acceptance from the Aryan Brotherhood in prison, but his role was submissive.
